--- 
title: "My Bookdown Template"
author: |
 |
 | Prepared for

 |
 |
 | Prepared by
 | Al Irvine, B.Sc., R.P.Bio. and Lucy Schick, B.Sc.
 | New Graph Environment Ltd.

date: |
 |
 | Version `r desc::desc_get_version()` `r format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")`
 |
 | *Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic) assisted with literature synthesis, drafting, and technical writing. All scientific interpretation, data analysis, and conclusions are the responsibility of the authors.*
toc-title: Table of Contents
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
          includes:
            in_header: header.html
params:
  repo_url: 'https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/mybookdown-template/'
  report_url: 'https://newgraphenvironment.github.io/mybookdown-template'
  update_packages: FALSE
  update_bib: FALSE
  gitbook_on: TRUE
  password_protected: TRUE
  password_dir: 'dc4e2becf638f6d21012603c890b0ffb98bd80f2'
nocite: |
  @irvine2024NewGraphEnvironmentfpr
documentclass: book
bibliography: "`r if (params$update_bib) { rbbt::bbt_write_bib('references.bib', overwrite = TRUE); 'references.bib' } else 'references.bib'`"
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: no
description: "My Description."
lof: true

---


```{r jquery, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
#see https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/mybookdown-template/issues/16
htmltools::tagList(rmarkdown::html_dependency_jquery())
```


```{r setup, echo=identical(params$gitbook_on, TRUE), include = TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=identical(params$gitbook_on, TRUE), message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, dpi=60, out.width = "100%", fig.width = 8, fig.height = 6)
# knitr::knit_hooks$set(webgl = hook_webgl)
options(scipen=999)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '--') #'--'
options(knitr.kable.NAN = '--')
```


```{r source}
source('scripts/packages.R')
source('scripts/functions.R')
source('scripts/staticimports.R')
```

```{r settings-defaults}
# Defaults (overridden by settings-gitbook or settings-paged-html if they eval)
photo_width <- "100%"
font_set <- 11
```

```{r settings-gitbook, eval= params$gitbook_on}
photo_width <- "100%"
font_set <- 11

```

```{r settings-paged-html, eval= identical(params$gitbook_on, FALSE)}
photo_width <- "80%"
font_set <- 9
```


```{r include=FALSE}
# automatically create a bib database for R packages
knitr::write_bib(c(
  .packages(), 'bookdown', 'knitr', 'rmarkdown'
), 'packages.bib')
```

# Acknowledgement {.front-matter .unnumbered}

At New Graph Environment, we understand our well-being as inseparable from the health of the land and waters we work within. When we care for ecosystems, we care for ourselves and for the communities connected to them.

This work takes place within the territories of [Nations], who have stewarded these lands and waters since time immemorial. [Project-specific connection to territory, governance, species, or watershed.]

[Funding and partner acknowledgements.]


```{js, logo-header, echo = FALSE, eval= T}
title=document.getElementById('header');
title.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center"><img src="fig/logo_newgraph/BLACK/PNG/nge-full_black.png" alt="NewGraph" width="750px"></div>' + title.innerHTML
```
